title: What Is Gemini Embedding 2 - AI Model Maps Text, Images, Video Together
description: Google has launched Gemini Embedding 2, its first fully multimodal embedding model.

title: Rupee tailwind vs AI scare: Are India's beaten-down IT stocks attractive enough to buy amid US-Iran war?
description: Indian IT stocks are facing a dual challenge. Fears of artificial intelligence disrupting traditional outsourcing models are weighing on the sector. However, geopolitical tensions and a weaker rupee are providing unexpected support. Analysts are divided on whether current valuations offer attractive entry points for long-term investors. The sector is at a crossroads, with a structural transition underway.

title: Worker Anxiety Over AI Is Growing, and Employers Aren't Preparing Employees for What's Next, New Survey Finds
description: JFF research highlights AI's disproportionate impact on early-career workers and points to the need for greater employer support BOSTON, March 11, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- In a marked shift from a year ago, workers are now more likely to say AI is a net-negative than a net-positive when it...

title: AI rivals unite behind Anthropic court battle
description: Legal confrontation between artificial intelligence developer Anthropic and the United States Department of Defense has triggered an unusual show of solidarity across the technology sector, with researchers from competing companies publicly supporting the firm’s challenge against a national security designation that threatens its business.
